stories.headline: Charting a Flood
stories.summary: Chris Williams explores the aftermath of a severe storm in San Antonio, examining why many flood-affected residents were unaware of their flood risk. The reporting reveals the correlation between damaged properties and flood plains, emphasizing the lack of flood insurance.

stories.headline: CAR Report from Latin America: Mexico and beyond
stories.summary: Periodistas de Investigación, founded by IRE members, trains Mexican journalists in investigative reporting techniques and computer-assisted reporting (CAR) methodologies to improve journalism standards across Latin America.
